app.name: DiasporaConnect
app.tagline: Sɛ́ kwɛ́ dó. Ma sɔ́ kɛ́n.

slide1.title: Kɛ́n jɛ nukɔn
slide1.subtitle: Tɛ́ kpɔ́n fǐ — tò mɛ́ mɔ̀ mǎ jɛ́ hǔn.

slide2.title: Kɛ́n sù hún.
slide2.subtitle: Akpà kwɛ́ sísɛ́ dó tò gǎnyì sù (7-15%). Private Ledger zɔ́n bɔ é hwe hǔn 1%.

slide3.title: Byɔ́
slide3.subtitle: Tɔn-mɛ́-tɔn, ayijayǐ mɛ́, bɔ é cá ɖó hwɛ̀ndòmɛ nǔ mǐtɔn gbé.

roles.title:
Étɛ́ wɛ́ nyí
tɛ̀n towe ?
roles.subtitle: Cè ɖagbè towe cóbó bɛ́ nǔ.

sender.title: Sɛ́ɖótɔ́ (Diaspora)
sender.desc: Un nɔ̀ sɛ́ kwɛ́ dó Bénin sín tò gǎnyì mɛ́.

recipient.title: Yǐtɔ́ (Bénin)
recipient.desc: Un nɔ̀ yǐ kwɛ́ ɖò Mobile Money (MTN / Moov) jí.

sender.title:
Cá wallet
towe
sender.subtitle: DiasporaConnect nɔ zán blockchain Celo bonú kwɛ́ towe ná nyí ɖagbe.

card.nameLabel: Mɛ̀ é tɔn káti ɔ nyìkɔ
card.secureNote: PCI-DSS encrypted. DiasporaConnect nɔ̀ blà nǔmɛ́lò towe lɛ́ sé ǎ.

recipient.title: Nǔmɛ́lò towe
recipient.subtitle: Wlán Mobile Money nǔmɛ́lò towe é ɖò azɔ̌ jí ɖò Bénin.
recipient.sendCode: Sɛ́ SMS code dó nú mi

auth.loginError: É gní hǔn. Tɛ́ kpɔ́n dɛ̀ mɛ́.

referralPage.title: Mɛ̀ ylyɔ́
referralPage.heroSub:
0.50 USD ɖò mɛ ɖokpo ɖokpo é a yí ɔ wu
dò wallet Celo towe mɛ
referralPage.totalEarnings: Akwɛ nabi é a yí é bi
referralPage.howItWorks: Nɛ̌ é nɔ wà azɔ̌ gbɔn
referralPage.qrSubtitle: Scàn bonú a na bɛ́ DiasporaConnect
referralPage.legalNote: Akwɛ sín dó na wá wallet Celo towe mɛ hwenu mɛ e a ylyɔ́ ɔ sɛ́ akwɛ nukɔntɔn ɔ (minimum 50 USD).
referralPage.shareMessage: Wá DiasporaConnect mɛ bo nɔ sɛ́ akwɛ dó Bénin kpo axɔ́ kpɛví kpo! Zǎn code élɔ́ {{code}} nú nukɔntɔn towe. 🌍
referralPage.shareTitle: DiasporaConnect — Akwɛ sɛ́sɛ́ axɔ́ ma ɖó
referralPage.step1: Má code towe xá xɔ́ntɔn towe
referralPage.step2: É na bɛ́ bo sɛ́ akwɛ nukɔntɔn
referralPage.step3: A na yí 0.50 USD ɖò wallet Celo towe mɛ

savingsPage.title: Akwɛ kpɛví kpɛví blati
savingsPage.withdrawBtn: Ðè akwɛ blà blà ɔ sín
savingsPage.autoRoundDesc: Ðò akwɛ sɛ́sɛ́ ɖokpo ɖokpo mɛ ɔ, é nɔ kpi akwɛ ɔ bo nɔ sɛ́ dó Celo bo nɔ hɛ̀n vi wá.
savingsPage.option3: 1 USD ɖò akwɛ sɛ́sɛ́ bi mɛ
savingsPage.defiNote: Moola Market wɛ nɔ hɛ̀n akwɛ élɔ́ lɛ́. 4.2% sín vi ɔ hɛ̀n na hú hǔ nɛ̌.
savingsPage.withdrawConfirm: Ðè akwɛ {{amount}} USD dó wallet Celo towe mɛ?
savingsPage.withdrawSuccessDesc: A na mɔ akwɛ ɔ ɖò 2-3 cɛju mɛ.

calculator.title: Kɛ́n kwɛ́ sísɛ́ tɔn
calculator.savingsNote1: Gbɔn DiasporaConnect gblamɛ ɔ, a nɔ hwlɛn
calculator.savingsNote2: ɖò xwédo mɛ̀ hú àxì jí.

send.belongsTo: Nǔmɛ́lò nɛ́ nyí {{name}} tɔn — é wɛ́ a ná sɛ́ kwɛ́ dó à ?
send.errorNotFound: Nǔmɛ́lò nɛ́ ma ɖò {{operator}} Money jí hǔn.
send.errorApiFailure: Mǐ ma mɔ̀ nyǐkɔ hǔn. Bɛ́ nǔ tò dɛ̀ mɛ́ ?
send.forceConfirmText: Un gbeɖé bɔ un ná sɛ́ kwɛ́ dó
send.qrReading: É ɖò QR code sà jí...
send.confirmTo: Un gbeɖé un ná sɛ́ kwɛ́ dó {{name}}
send.legalInfo: A gbeɖé hǔn, a yí gbe nú kwɛ́ sísɛ́ dó to Private Ledger jí ɖò Celo Alfajores. Kwɛ́ ɔ ná tɔ́n tlóló nú retrait ɖò Bénin.
send.confirmRequiredDesc: Cè boîte ɔ bo gbeɖé {{name}} sísɛ́ dó.
send.transferFailed: Kwɛ́ sísɛ́ dó ma nyɔ́. Vɔ̀ jɛ̂.

recurring.title: Akwɛ-sɛ́sɛ́-dó
recurring.amountLabel: Akwɛ nabi é a ná sɛ́ ɔ
recurring.emptyTitle: Akwɛ ɖebǔ kún ɖò tɛ̀n dìn
recurring.emptyDesc: Sɔ́ akwɛ-sɛ́sɛ́ sun-sun tɔn ɖ'ayǐ bonú a má wɔn mɛ towe lɛ́ gbe ó.
recurring.amountInvalidDesc: Kɛ́n dɛ̀ mɛ́ d'alɔ akwɛ é hú zero ɔ.
recurring.scheduledDesc: Akwɛ {{amount}} USD dó {{name}} azǎn {{day}} sun ɖokpó ɖokpó mɛ.
recurring.deleteConfirm: Sú gbe nú akwɛ élɔ́ dó {{name}}?

history.title: Tan dɛ̀ mɛ́ tɔn
history.emptyNote: Kwɛ́ pípá towe lɛ́ɛ ná tɔ́n ɖò fí.

recipient.withdrawInstruction:
Fitɛ́ wɛ́ a jló na
yǐ kwɛ́ towe ɖè ?
recipient.withdrawInfo: Kwɛ́ ɖè nɔ yì yawu ɖò Bénin. DiasporaConnect nɔ ɖó kɛ́n ɖebǔ ɖò é jí hǔn.
recipient.mtnDesc: Transfert tlóló ɖò MTN Mobile Money jí
recipient.moovDesc: Transfert tlóló ɖò Moov Money jí
recipient.withdrawSuccessLong: Kwɛ́ ná wá nǔmɛ́lò towe jí hwenu é network ná gbeɖé sánsán kwɛ́ tɔn sín Private Ledger.
recipient.estimatedDelay: Hwenu é ná bɛ́: xá hú cɛ́jú {{time}} ǎ
recipient.withdrawSecurityNote: 🔒 Private Ledger wɛ́ nɔ kpé nukún nú kwɛ́ towe. Kwɛ́ ɔ ná wá nǔmɛ́lò towe jí ɖò cɛ́jú 2 mɛ́.
recipient.withdrawDesc: Kwɛ́ ná wá nǔmɛ́lò towe jí ɖò cɛ́jú mɛ́.

impact.title: Impact
impact.subtitle: Mǐ ɖò gbɛ̀ ɖagbe gbá jí bonú mɛ bǐ ná mɔ tɛn
impact.savedVsWU: Kwɛ́ é a blà hú Western Union
impact.totalSavedGlobal: Kwɛ́ é mǐ bǐ blà ɖò kɛ́n mɛ
impact.odd1Desc: Mǐ nɔ̀ d'alɔ mɛ́ é ma ɖó nǔ hǔn lɛ́ɛ bonú sísɛ́ dó ná vɔ̀ kɛ́n.
impact.odd8Desc: Mǐ nɔ̀ d'alɔ Bénin tò gbe bonú kwɛ́ ná hɛ̀n d'alɔ xwédo lɛ́ɛ.
impact.odd10Desc: Mɛ́ bǐ ná mɔ̀ kwɛ́ sísɛ́ dó tɛ̀n, ɖò tò mɛ kpó gle mɛ kpó.

kyc.title: Nǔkpɔ́n wěma
kyc.subtitle: É ɖò dandan nú a na sɛ́ kwɛ́ hú 500 USD/sun. É nɔ fɛ́ bakúnu 2.
kyc.privacyNote: Mǐ nɔ bɛ nǔ towe lɛ́ɛ ɖó ayijayǐ mɛ.
kyc.verifyingAI: IA mǐtɔn ɖò nǔ kpɔ́n wɛ
kyc.successDesc: A sixú sɛ́ kwɛ́ yì 2 000 USD. Akɔ́n towe ko hun bǐ.

tracker.title: Kwɛ́ seguimiento
tracker.confSteps: Nǔ é è na xà lɛ́ɛ

notifications.title: Alɛ́tì lɛ́ɛ
notifications.hero: Cè alɛ́tì é a jló na mɔ̀ lɛ́ɛ.
notifications.rateAlertDesc: A na nywɛ́ hwenu é taux EUR/FCFA sù bǐ
notifications.transferSentDesc: Gbeɖé hwenu é kwɛ́ ko yì
notifications.securityAlertDesc: IA mǐtɔn kpɔ́n kwɛ́ é ma nyɔ́ ǎ lɛ́ɛ
notifications.weeklyReportDesc: Tɛn dɛ̀ mɛ́ tɔn Lundi ɖokpǒ ɖokpǒ
notifications.infoBox: IA mǐtɔn wɛ nɔ kpɔ́n taux lɛ bo nɔ sɛ́ wɛn dó we hwenu e é nyɔ́ tawun é.
notifications.recurringBody: Flín : a na sɛ́ {{amount}} USD dó {{name}} ɖò sùn élɔ́ mɛ
notifications.weeklyReportBody: A sɛ́ akwɛ {{transfers}} azɔn · a hɛ̀n {{savings}} USD

support.hero:
Nɛ̌ wɛ́ mǐ ná dó
alɔ we gbɔn ?
support.faq1Q: Hwenu nɛ́ wɛ́ kwɛ́ ná sɛ́ dó ná bɛ́ ?
support.faq1A: É xá hú cɛ́jú 60 ǎ ɖò Celo Alfajores jí. A sixú ɖè kwɛ́ towe tlóló ɖò Mobile Money jí.
support.faq2Q: Kɛ́n nɛ́ wɛ́ è nɔ ɖè ?
support.faq2A: DiasporaConnect nɔ ɖè 0,8 % ɖò kwɛ́ é a sɛ́ ɔ jí. Kɛ́n Celo tɔn hú 0,01 USD ǎ.
support.faq3A: Ɛɛn. Kwɛ́ towe ɖò smart contract mɛ bɔ è kpɔ́n ɖagbe ɖò blockchain Celo jí.
support.faq4Q: Mobile Money tɛ́ mɛ́ wɛ́ è sixú ɖè kwɛ́ ɖè ?
support.faq4A: MTN Money kpó Moov Money kpó ɖò Bénin. To ɖěvo lɛ́ɛ ná wá tlóló.
support.messagePlaceholder: Ɖɔ nǔ é ma ɖò yìyì jí ǎ ɔ...
support.alertBody: Mǐ ná yí gbe nú we ɖò ganxixo 24 mɛ.

beneficiaries.title: Yǐtɔ́ lɛ́ɛ
beneficiaries.emptyDesc: Dò jǐǐ yǐtɔ́ towe lɛ́ɛ bonú a ná sɛ́ kwɛ́ tlóló.
beneficiaries.requiredFields: Nyǐkɔ kpó nǔmɛ́lò kpó nyí nǔ tají.
